lint.detail: npx next lint has no ESLint config committed in this repo (interactive first-run prompt, not a CI-usable command); no .eslintrc*/eslint.config* present. Treated as NO_LINT per Step 0's NO_TESTS-style tolerance.

environment.relay: brought up via `make e2e-up` (strfry + blossom-mock, both healthy)
environment.playwright_browsers_note: The pre-baked /opt/playwright-browsers image ships chromium-1228/chromium_headless_shell-1228, but the installed @playwright/test (1.58.2) expects revision 1208. Worked around by creating two symlinks (chromium-1208 -> chromium-1228, chromium_headless_shell-1208 -> chromium_headless_shell-1228) in /opt/playwright-browsers, which is world-writable (777) even though its .links registry subdirectory is root-owned. This is an environment provisioning mismatch unrelated to this story's code; flagged for the meta-retro.
